productDisplayName: Converse Men As Canvas Hi Green Shoe
description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star canvas shoe from converse is also called Chucks and comes in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite. This Chuck Taylor Double Tongue Triple Colour Oxford has a three-coloured tongue that makes it a hot favourite. Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability High ankle for a snug, comfort Fit and for enhanced support to the lower leg Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Two canvas tongues in contrast colours for added comfort and style Eyelets on the inner and outer flaps Padded footbed with a fabric lining for cushioning and all-day comfort Outsole Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Reinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durability Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains Shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
